About

Welcome to my world — where precision meets entrepreneurial vision and a relentless drive to build things that matter.

I’m Dario, based in Schaan, Liechtenstein. From precision mechanical engineering at Evatec to co-founding AI-powered startups, shipping apps across every Apple platform and writing my debut book — I’m drawn to where technology, creativity and human experience converge.

I believe the time to act is always now.

Book

Available on Amazon

The Time
Is Now

by Dario Tino  ·  Feb 1, 2026

“Master Your Mind, Master Your Life”

A call to action for anyone waiting for the right moment. Drawing on years of building companies, shipping products and navigating uncertainty — a blueprint for decisive living and bold action in an accelerating world.
